name_en: 【Top Quality Replica】M14718 Pink 👏👏 A compact accessory blending classic style with a modern vibe. Features the iconic Monogram canvas with a vibrant leather lining for contrast. Functional and fun design, characterized by the Maison's signature single-cell flower, with enamel and metal charms. Dimensions: 9 x 10 x 2.5cm. 🎁🎁
